title: Data of Chapter 3
author: Schmitz, Rob
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data belonging to chapter 3 of the dissertation "Metabolic versatility of verrucomicrobial methanotrophs". 

 DNA sequences inside pET30a(+) vectors that were produced through PCR using the specified designed primers.
